# kernel/linux/userspace/CMakeLists.txt
# Role: Build the Horkos Linux eBPF userspace loader (Loader.cpp).  Links
#       against libbpf and depends on the skeleton headers generated by the
#       sibling kernel/linux/bpf/ CMakeLists.  Skipped on non-Linux hosts so
#       the overall CMake tree continues to configure on macOS/Windows dev boxes.
# Target platform: Linux userspace.
# Interface: builds the hk_bpf_loader static library consumed by the top-level
#            server or a test harness.
# API reference: https://libbpf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api.html

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

# ---- Require Linux ----------------------------------------------------------
if(NOT CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")
    message(STATUS
        "kernel/linux/userspace: not Linux, skipping eBPF loader build.")
    return()
endif()

# ---- Locate libbpf ----------------------------------------------------------
# pkg-config is the canonical way to find libbpf on Debian/Ubuntu/Fedora.
# Install: apt install libbpf-dev  OR  dnf install libbpf-devel
find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
pkg_check_modules(LIBBPF REQUIRED libbpf)

if(NOT LIBBPF_FOUND)
    message(STATUS
        "kernel/linux/userspace: libbpf not found — loader build skipped. "
        "Install libbpf-dev (Debian/Ubuntu) or libbpf-devel (Fedora/RHEL).")
    return()
endif()

# ---- SDK include path -------------------------------------------------------
# horkos/event_schema.h lives under sdk/include; locate it relative to this
# CMakeLists by walking up from CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR.
set(HK_SDK_INCLUDE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../sdk/include")

# ---- Build the loader library -----------------------------------------------
add_library(hk_bpf_loader STATIC
    Loader.cpp
)

target_include_directories(hk_bpf_loader
    PUBLIC
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}"   # Loader.h
        "${HK_SDK_INCLUDE}"             # horkos/event_schema.h
    PRIVATE
        "${LIBBPF_INCLUDE_DIRS}"
)

target_link_libraries(hk_bpf_loader
    PRIVATE
        ${LIBBPF_LIBRARIES}
)

target_compile_options(hk_bpf_loader PRIVATE
    -Wall -Wextra -Werror
)

target_compile_features(hk_bpf_loader PRIVATE cxx_std_17)

# ---- Depend on generated skeleton headers -----------------------------------
# hk_bpf_generated is the INTERFACE target exported by kernel/linux/bpf/
# CMakeLists.  Adding it here ensures the .skel.h files are generated before
# Loader.cpp is compiled, and that the generated include directory is on the
# path.
#
# The parent CMakeLists must have called add_subdirectory(bpf) before
# add_subdirectory(userspace) for hk_bpf_generated to be defined.
if(TARGET hk_bpf_generated)
    target_link_libraries(hk_bpf_loader PRIVATE hk_bpf_generated)
else()
    message(WARNING
        "kernel/linux/userspace: hk_bpf_generated target not found. "
        "Ensure add_subdirectory(bpf) precedes add_subdirectory(userspace) "
        "in the parent CMakeLists.txt.")
endif()
